hero.hero_title_1: Run Any Database Natively on VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service - Without the Compromise.
hero.hero_description: Deploy and manage 25+ Production-grade databases as native Kubernetes resources on VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service (VKS). Leverage vSphere CSI, vSAN, and your existing vSphere infrastructure - with broader choice, zero extra licensing, and true GitOps agility compared to traditional DBaaS.

platform.heading: Your VMware vSphere Investment is Ready for Modern Databases
platform.description: VKS delivers enterprise Kubernetes directly on vSphere with deep integration to vCenter, vSAN, and NSX. KubeDB makes databases first-class citizens, without the cost or limitations of traditional DBaaS.

cards.title: VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service (VKS)
cards.description: Enterprise-grade, CNCF-conformant Kubernetes service built into vSphere Supervisor. Self-service cluster lifecycle, centralized governance, policy enforcement, and seamless integration with vSphere infrastructure.
features: Multi-cluster management via VMware Cloud Foundation

cards.title: vSphere CSI + vSAN Storage
cards.description: Native Container Storage Interface driver with full vSAN integration. Delivers high-performance persistent volumes, snapshots, encryption, and enterprise-grade data services.

cards.title: Traditional DBaaS on vSphere
cards.description: External managed services or limited operators. Higher costs, vendor lock-in, and less agility compared to running databases natively on VKS with KubeDB.
cards.note: KubeDB delivers the modern database platform your vSphere environment deserves.

comparison.heading: Traditional DBaaS vs VMware VKS + KubeDB
comparison.description: KubeDB on VKS gives you broader database support, zero extra licensing, and deep vSphere integration.

rows.kubedb: 25+ engines: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch, ClickHouse, Cassandra, Neo4j & more
Declarative GitOps - unified with your apps
No licensing fees • Use existing vSphere resources
Native vSphere CSI + vSAN - high-performance, snapshots, encryption
Built-in TLS + vSphere RBAC, NSX, and policy enforcement
Same manifests across all VKS clusters

benefits.heading: Why VMware vSphere Customers Choose KubeDB on VKS

items.title: Lower TCO
items.description: No external DBaaS licensing or egress fees. Run everything on your existing vSphere infrastructure and VKS clusters.

items.title: Developer Agility
items.description: Databases become native Kubernetes objects. Enable self-service provisioning with the same GitOps workflows used for applications.

items.title: Enterprise Security
items.description: Seamless integration with vSphere RBAC, NSX networking, and policy enforcement plus built-in TLS and encryption.

items.title: vSphere-Optimized Storage
items.description: Native vSphere CSI driver with vSAN delivers sub-millisecond latency, snapshots, cloning, and enterprise resilience.

items.title: Hybrid Cloud Freedom
items.description: Consistent manifests across VKS on-prem, VMware Cloud, or any CNCF Kubernetes, no lock-in.

items.title: Unified Operations
items.description: Manage VMs, containers, and databases from a single vSphere and VKS control plane.

architecture.heading: KubeDB runs natively on VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service
architecture.description: The KubeDB Operator sits directly on top of your VKS infrastructure, leveraging vSphere's enterprise-grade security, vSAN storage, and high-performance capabilities.

layers.label: KubeDB Platform
layers.desc: Web Console • Envoy Gateway • Hub/Spoke Model • Policy Engine

layers.label: Kubernetes Services
layers.desc: ArgoCD • Open Cluster Management • Cert Manager • Prometheus • Grafana

architecture.image_alt: KubeDB Platform Architecture on VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service

capabilities.heading: Key Capabilities of KubeDB on VKS

items.title: Automated Lifecycle Management
items.description: Declarative operators handle provisioning, upgrades, scaling, and repair with zero-downtime where possible.

items.title: High Availability & Resiliency
items.description: Multi-zone clustering, automated failover, PodDisruptionBudgets, and continuous health checks with VKS integration.

items.title: Backup & Recovery
items.description: Integrated with KubeStash for policy-driven, incremental, encrypted backups to S3-compatible storage. Support for point-in-time recovery.

items.title: Monitoring & Observability
items.description: Native Prometheus + Grafana dashboards. Integrates with VKS monitoring stack for complete visibility.

items.title: Security & Governance
items.description: Automated TLS, Transparent Data Encryption, RBAC integration with vSphere, network policies, and NSX support.

items.title: Storage Optimization
items.description: vSphere CSI with sub-millisecond latency, vSAN integration, snapshots, and enterprise resilience for all databases.

database_support.heading: Comprehensive Database Support
database_support.description: 25+ Database engines managed with Kubernetes-native workflows

categories.label: Relational
categories.items: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, Percona XtraDB

cta.heading: Run Databases Natively
cta.description: vSAN storage, enterprise performance, hybrid cloud flexibility

features.text: Run anywhere: vSphere or VMware Cloud
